description: Introducing an animated, light and clean email design perfect for authors, publishers and book clubs. This template is ideal for announcing the launch of a new eBook, making it a bright addition to any literature lover's inbox. With a simple and clean layout, it keeps the focus on the newly published reading material, perfect for your book of the month. It fits seamlessly into the News, Blog & Magazines, Software and Technology, and Education spheres, making it an excellent tool for publishing industries. This template is also great for Book Lover’s Day promotions or any apps and downloads related to reading. Its animated features add a dynamic touch, keeping your audience engaged as they explore your latest literature.
short_description: Introduce your latest eBook with an animated, light, clean email template. Ideal for authors, publishers, book clubs, and perfect for highlighting your book of the month. Fits into News, Blog & Magazines, Software, Education sectors, and Book Lover’s Day promotions. Engage your readers with dynamic features.

designer.description:
My name is Allison Valenzuela, I'm a Midwest based graphic designer. Born and raised in Davenport, Iowa and currently living in Moline. I graduated from the University of Iowa with a BFA in Graphic Design and a Certificate of Entrepreneurial Management in May 2015.

Taking on a creative challenge, working hard to make ideas a reality and puzzle piecing things together is what I do best. I always sport a positive and can-do attitude. I love doing freelance, so if you've got a project that you'd like to get in touch with me about, send me a message!

html_data:
READY FOR YOUR
NEXT BIG READ?

The next big adventure by award winning author Saffron Keys is here!

About This Book

Lorem Ipsum has been used for centuries and it isn’t going anywhere. But as designers search for a truly unique product, it’s reasonable to want to avoid such a commonly used filler and turn to more original alternatives while real content is on its way.

Learn More

Nor again is there anyone who loves or pursues or desires to obtain pain of itself, because it is pain, but because occasionally circumstances occur in which toil and pain can procure him some great pleasure. To take a trivial example, which of us ever undertakes laborious physical exercise, except to obtain some advantage from it?

Want More?

Check out Saffron Keys’ blog to get more updates and behind the scenes of her works!

Check Out The Blog

Frist Step

Click on the download button above to shop!

Second Step

Download the eBook from the confirmation email!

Third Step

Enjoy your new book &
let us know if you liked it!

Changed your mind? You can unsubscribe at any time.
